testsuite.name: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT no simple transfer and one stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT one simple transfer and one stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT two simple transfer and one stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with two RPTs, both with no simple transfer and one stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with two RPTs, both with one simple transfer and one stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with two RPTs, with different quantity of simple transfer and stamps

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with three RPTs, with different quantity of simple transfer and stamps

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with one RPT that has a quantity of transfers and stamps above the limit

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_withStamp.User pays a payment carts with stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with two RPTs that has a quantity of transfers and stamps above the limit
